calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Aug-12-2015 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearances on Wednesday, August 12, 2015, in Department 525:
Kelvin Seah, Respondent/Plaintiff appears as Propria Persona.
Lawrence Wisne, Appellant/Defendant appears in Propria Persona.

This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo. All parties are sworn. Plaintiff/Respondent, Kelvin Seah testifies on his own behalf and responds to the questions from the Court.

Defendant/Appellant, Lawrence Wisne testifies on his own behalf and responds to the questions from the Court. The following documentary evidence is introduced: Not Marked - agreement,

At the conclusion of the hearing, the Court takes this matter under submission. Unmarked evidence returned to Mr. Wisne in the Court.

Judge Pro Tem Marc Seidenfeld; Clerk J. Kong; matter not reported.

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar May-26-2015 Judgment Entered
